steps.title: Spot the causal relationship
steps.content: The voters were impressed by the album, then they awarded it the award. The transition must signal that the award follows as a natural consequence of the impression.

steps.title: Match the transition to the logic
steps.content: ”Accordingly” means “as a result,” exactly what's needed here. The other three signal wrong relationships: “In contrast” = opposition, “Meanwhile” = simultaneity, “Nevertheless” = reversal. That matches choice B — B is correct.
